name: opera-server
description: Opera legacy Node backend source reference only (runtime disabled)

scripts.dev:
node -e "console.error('opera-server runtime is disabled. Use the FastAPI backend instead:
  Windows: ../start-backend.ps1
  Linux/macOS: ../start-backend.sh
  Docker: docker compose up --build'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.start:
node -e "console.error('opera-server runtime is disabled. Use the FastAPI backend instead:
  Windows: ../start-backend.ps1
  Linux/macOS: ../start-backend.sh
  Docker: docker compose up --build'); process.exit(1)"
